text:
(skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
654 GG0170B2_SIT_LYNG_GOAL_END_CD GG0170B2_SIT_LYNG_GOAL_END_CD GG0170B2 Mobility: Sit to Lying Goal by End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's goal to move from a sitting to lying position by the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 ^=Blank
